scripts.env:select: sh -c 'env_name=${RAILWAY_ENVIRONMENT_NAME:-production}; src_env="./src/.env.${env_name}"; if [ -f "$src_env" ]; then cp "$src_env" ./src/.env; elif [ -f ./src/.env.production ]; then cp ./src/.env.production ./src/.env; fi; app_url=$(grep -E "^APP_URL=" ./src/.env | head -n 1 | cut -d= -f2-); [ -n "$app_url" ] || app_url=https://app.padylife.ir; app_url_escaped=$(printf "%s" "$app_url" | sed "s/[\\/&]/\\\\&/g"); sed -i "s|__APP_URL__|$app_url_escaped|g" ./src/index.html'
